name: Texas T-Bone with Wild Mushrooms and Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 4 T-bone steaks, 1.5 inches thick (16 ounces each)
Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
1 pound fresh wild mushrooms, sliced (chanterelle, morel, oyster, shiitake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a direct-heat fire in a charcoal grill and oil the grill rack.
2. When coals are ready, rub the steaks on both sides with salt and pepper to taste. Place on the grill and cook, turning once, 6 to 8 minutes per side for medium-rare.
3. Meanwhile, melt butter in a sauté pan over medium-high heat. Add thyme and garlic and sauté until softened, about 2 to 4 minutes.
4. Stir in the mushrooms and sauté until soft, about 2 to 4 minutes. Pour in the wine and bring to a boil. Remove from the heat.
5. Transfer steaks to individual plates and spoon the mushroom mixture evenly over the top. Garnish with grilled tomatoes, onion slices, and herb sprigs, then serve immediately.
